name: One piece RPG
description:
The One Piece Universe… if it was dark and realistic (3 openings)
LoreBooks included

The One Piece Universe… if it was dark and realistic. That means violence, actual deaths, rape. Eat the strange fruit, and discover your devil fruit power. 3 OPENINGS

OPENING 1 - TRUE NETURAL: You start on an island and begin your journey. (Suggest first timers start here and see where it goes)
OPENING 2 - LAWFUL GOOD: An uncorrupted Navy member wants to recruit you.
OPENING 3 - CHAOTIC EVIL: A seductress pirates wants to recruit you.
OPENING 4- CREATE YOUR OWN SCENARIO

Progress and update notes:
creator: LeoDaVinnci
